login.metaDescription: [ES] Sign in to your school car line board
login.title: [ES] Log in
login.subtitle: [ES] Sign in to manage your school's car line board.

errors.noAccount: [ES] No account found for that email.
errors.generic: [ES] Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.rateLimited: [ES] Too many attempts. Please try again in a minute.

step1.title: [ES] Create your account
step1.subtitle: [ES] Use your work email. You'll set up your school next.

step2.title: [ES] Your school
step2.subtitle: [ES] Your slug becomes part of your school's web address. It must be unique.

step3.title: [ES] Start your free trial
step3.subtitle: [ES] Your 30-day trial starts as soon as you finish setup. No credit card required.
step3.districtAddon: [ES] We'll reach out during your trial to discuss your district's pricing and setup.

planDescriptions.district: [ES] Custom pricing — confirmed with you during the trial.
planDescriptions.campus: [ES] $500 / month per school after your 30-day trial.
planDescriptions.carLine: [ES] $100 / month per school after your 30-day trial.

step3.terms: [ES] By continuing you agree to our terms. You can change tiers later by contacting support.

errors.rateLimited: [ES] Too many attempts. Please try again in a minute.
errors.sessionExpired: [ES] Your session expired. Please refresh and sign in again.
errors.generic: [ES] Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.invalidSlug: [ES] Enter a valid slug (letters, numbers, and hyphens).
errors.sessionExpiredShort: [ES] Your session expired. Refresh and sign in again.
errors.slugTaken: [ES] That slug is already taken. Try another or pick a suggestion.
errors.schoolNameTooShort: [ES] School name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.checkSlug: [ES] Check that your slug is available using "Check availability" before continuing.
errors.phoneTooShort: [ES] Phone number must be at least 10 digits.
errors.passwordTooShort: [ES] Password must be at least 8 characters.

forgotPassword.metaDescription: [ES] Start a password reset for your PickupRoster account.
forgotPassword.title: [ES] Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: [ES] Enter the email on your account and we'll send you a link to pick a new password.

submitted.headline: [ES] Check your inbox.
submitted.body: [ES] If an account matches that email and password reset is enabled for your organization, we just sent a link. It expires in 60 minutes.
submitted.ssoNote: [ES] Didn't get one? Your organization may use single sign-on — ask your admin how to get in.

errors.rateLimited: [ES] Too many attempts. Try again in a minute.

invalid.title: [ES] Reset link invalid
invalid.subtitle: [ES] This link has expired, already been used, or isn't recognized. Start over and we'll send you a fresh one.

valid.title: [ES] Choose a new password
valid.subtitle: [ES] At least {{min}} characters. After saving, you'll be logged out of all devices and need to sign in again.

errors.rateLimited: [ES] Too many attempts. Try again in a minute.
errors.passwordMin: [ES] Password must be at least {{min}} characters.
errors.expired: [ES] That reset link has expired. Request a new one.
errors.used: [ES] That reset link has already been used. Request a new one.
errors.orgDisabled: [ES] Password reset is disabled for your organization. Contact your admin.
errors.invalid: [ES] That reset link is invalid. Request a new one.
errors.successToast: [ES] Password updated. Please log in with your new password.

setPassword.metaDescription: [ES] Set your password for your school car line
setPassword.title: [ES] Set your password
setPassword.subtitle: [ES] Replace your temporary password with a new one you'll remember.

errors.passwordTooShort: [ES] Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.setFailed: [ES] Failed to set new password. Please try again.
errors.generic: [ES] Something went wrong. Please try again.

setPasswordRequired.subtitle: [ES] Please set a password to continue.

errors.passwordTooShort: [ES] Password must be at least 8 characters.

viewerAccess.title: [ES] Private Viewer Access
viewerAccess.subtitle: [ES] Enter the shared access code from your school administrator.

billingRequired.bodySuspended: [ES] This organization was suspended after extended non-payment. Update your payment method and pay any outstanding invoice to restore access.
billingRequired.bodyAction: [ES] Your organization billing status is not active. Update the subscription to regain full app access.
billingRequired.freePlanNote: [ES] If you are on the free plan, contact support to re-activate your org.

billingCancel.title: [ES] No charge made
billingCancel.body: [ES] You backed out of Stripe Checkout before completing the purchase. No subscription was created.

billingSuccess.title: [ES] You're upgraded — welcome to Pickup Roster {{plan}}!
billingSuccess.body: [ES] {{orgName}} is now on the {{plan}} plan. Your receipt is on its way from Stripe.
